_meta.description: College placement data and education signals for Bangalore engineering colleges
_meta.update_frequency: Bi-annual (post-placement season: Nov and May) — community contributed
_meta.how_to_update: Reach out to placement coordinators at target colleges, or crowdsource via alumni groups on LinkedIn/WhatsApp. Submit PR with updated values.

placement_rates.tier: Top non-IIT Bangalore colleges (RV, BMS, PESIT, MSRIT, NIE)
placement_rates.note: Many offers not converting — joining delays, mass rescissions by mid-tier IT companies
placement_rates.note_non_it: Rising share of CS/IT grads taking non-tech jobs — structural demand signal

role_risk_matrix.reason: Automated testing tools and AI-driven QA directly replacing this at scale
role_risk_matrix.action: Upskill to SDET, automation testing, shift-left QA engineering

role_risk_matrix.reason: LLM-based chatbots and RAG systems replacing first-line support extensively
role_risk_matrix.action: Move to L3 infra, SRE, cloud ops, or security operations

role_risk_matrix.reason: Copilot-class tools significantly reduce lines-of-code-per-head requirements
role_risk_matrix.action: Focus on system design, architecture decisions, AI tool fluency

role_risk_matrix.reason: Requirements documentation, test cases, user stories being AI-generated
role_risk_matrix.action: Add product management skills, deep domain expertise, stakeholder leadership

role_risk_matrix.reason: Demand growing but tooling shifting. LLM-powered pipelines changing stack.
role_risk_matrix.action: Learn modern stack: dbt, Spark, Iceberg, LLM integration patterns

role_risk_matrix.reason: Infrastructure complexity growing faster than AI can simplify it
role_risk_matrix.action: Certify in AWS/GCP/Azure, add FinOps and security ops skills

role_risk_matrix.reason: AI creates more attack surface, security demand grows with it
role_risk_matrix.action: CISSP, cloud security, red team / penetration testing specialisation

role_risk_matrix.reason: Builders of the wave — highest demand, hardest to offshore
role_risk_matrix.action: MLOps, LLMOps, fine-tuning, RAG architectures, AI product engineering

role_risk_matrix.reason: Business context + technical fluency + stakeholder influence — hardest to automate
role_risk_matrix.action: Build domain expertise + product sense on top of engineering foundation
